description: Two LLM iterations modeling the descriptive end of the Mend loop: pattern-exhaustiveness diagnostic with no machine-applicable fix. Iteration 0 is the LLM's initial attempt with the Cancelled arm missing; iteration 1 is the corrected version after the harness feeds the E0205 diagnostic back. The harness should NOT find a `replacement` field (no karac fix invocation) — convergence relies entirely on the LLM reading the message and adding the missing arm.

responses.note: LLM's first attempt — Cancelled arm missing. E0205 fires from the typecheck phase naming the missing variant.
After receiving the E0205 diagnostic naming Cancelled as the missing variant, the LLM adds the arm with a sensible description string. Build clean.
